segments.text: The Lord said to Moses,
Tell the Israelites to bring me an offering. You are to receive the offering for me from everyone whose heart prompts them to give.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: These are the offerings you are to receive from them: gold, silver and bronze;
blue, purple and scarlet yarn and fine linen; goat hair;
ram skins dyed red and another type of durable leather; acacia wood;
olive oil for the light; spices for the anointing oil and for the fragrant incense;
and onyx stones and other gems to be mounted on the ephod and breastpiece.
Then have them make a sanctuary for me, and I will dwell among them.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make this tabernacle and all its furnishings exactly like the pattern I will show you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Have them make an ark of acacia wood—two and a half cubits long, a cubit and a half wide, and a cubit and a half high.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Overlay it with pure gold, both inside and out, and make a gold molding around it.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Cast four gold rings for it and fasten them to its four feet, with two rings on one side and two rings on the other.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then make poles of acacia wood and overlay them with gold.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Insert the poles into the rings on the sides of the ark to carry it.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The poles are to remain in the rings of this ark; they are not to be removed.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then put in the ark the tablets of the covenant law, which I will give you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make an atonement cover of pure gold—two and a half cubits long and a cubit and a half wide.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And make two cherubim out of hammered gold at the ends of the cover.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make one cherub on one end and the second cherub on the other; make the cherubim of one piece with the cover, at the two ends.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The cherubim are to have their wings spread upward, overshadowing the cover with them. The cherubim are to face each other, looking toward the cover.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Place the cover on top of the ark and put in the ark the tablets of the covenant law that I will give you.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: There, above the cover between the two cherubim that are over the ark of the covenant law, I will meet with you and give you all my commands for the Israelites.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make a table of acacia wood—two cubits long, a cubit wide and a cubit and a half high.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Overlay it with pure gold and make a gold molding around it.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Also make around it a rim a handbreadth wide and put a gold molding on the rim.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make four gold rings for the table and fasten them to the four corners, where the four legs are.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The rings are to be close to the rim to hold the poles used in carrying the table.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make the poles of acacia wood, overlay them with gold and carry the table with them.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And make its plates and dishes of pure gold, as well as its pitchers and bowls for the pouring out of offerings.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Put the bread of the Presence on this table to be before me at all times.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Make a lampstand of pure gold. Hammer out its base and shaft, and make its flowerlike cups, buds and blossoms of one piece with them.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Six branches are to extend from the sides of the lampstand—three on one side and three on the other.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Three cups shaped like almond flowers with buds and blossoms are to be on one branch, three on the next branch, and the same for all six branches extending from the lampstand.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And on the lampstand there are to be four cups shaped like almond flowers with buds and blossoms.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: One bud shall be under the first pair of branches extending from the lampstand, a second bud under the second pair, and a third bud under the third pair—six branches in all.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The buds and branches shall all be of one piece with the lampstand, hammered out of pure gold.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then make its seven lamps and set them up on it so that they light the space in front of it.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Its wick trimmers and trays are to be of pure gold.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: A talent of pure gold is to be used for the lampstand and all these accessories.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: See that you make them according to the pattern shown you on the mountain.
segments.speaker: The Lord
